sb_prompt: DISCUSS THE WEATHER.   WHAT HAS IT BEEN LIKE IN YOUR AREA?   HAS IT BEEN TYPICAL FOR THIS TIME OF YEAR?  COMPARE IT WITH THE OTHER CALLER'S WEATHER.
turns: So, what's been going on with the weather lately?
Well, it's been quite unpredictable here actually. We've had our fair share of rain and some unexpected heat waves.
Hmm, that sounds pretty strange for this time of year. What kind of temperatures are we talking about during these heat waves?
The highest it's gotten recently was around ninety degrees Fahrenheit, which is significantly warmer than the usual mid-sixties to low seventies range we normally experience this time of year.
That does sound rather unusual. How has everyone been handling the sudden change in temperature?
Most folks have been taking it in stride, trying to stay hydrated and finding ways to keep cool during the day.
It's good to hear people are being cautious and mindful of their health during such extreme weather conditions.
Yes, absolutely. And yourself, how has the weather been treating you where you are?
In my area, things have been fairly consistent. We haven't experienced any major storms or extremes in temperature.
I see. Sounds like we've each had quite different experiences with the weather as of late.
Definitely. It seems like you guys have had more excitement than me with all the changes in weather.
Ha! Yes, that could be said. Though there's something to be said for consistency as well.
True, stability can bring its own sort of peace of mind, even if it's not always exciting.
Agreed. Well, I hope the rest of the season brings us both equally pleasant weather and good health!
Same to you, friend! Stay safe out there and enjoy whatever comes your way.
Thank you! You too. Have a great day!
You too, take care! Goodbye! *hangs up* Bye!
